name: Ultimate Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, combine the Butter Flavor Crisco, brown sugar, Milk, and Vanilla. Mix until well blended using a medium speed electric mixer. Add the Egg and beat in.
3. In another bowl, mix together the flour, Salt, and Baking soda. Gradually incorporate this mixture into the creamed mixture on low speed until just combined. Stir in the chocolate chips and pecans.
4. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough about 3 inches apart onto an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes until lightly browned and set (they will appear light and moist; avoid overbaking), or 11 to 13 minutes if desired crisp cookies. Allow cooling on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before transferring to a cooling rack.
